channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Beyond the hype: Key components of an effective AI policy
item.description: In today’s rapidly evolving technological landscape, artificial intelligence (AI) plays a pivotal role in transforming businesses across various sectors. From enhancing operational efficiency to revolutionizing customer experiences, AI offers immense potential.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: San Jose Fry’s Electronics site is poised to become huge tech hub
item.description: Super Micro Computer is floating a plan at San Jose City Hall to develop a brand-new building totaling 333,400 square feet that would be part of a tech hub in north San Jose.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Push to map Great Lakes bottom gains momentum amid promises effort will help fishing and shipping
item.description: What lies beneath the Great Lakes' waves is largely unknown, but there's a new push to learn more about thousands of shipwrecks, underwater infrastructure and the impacts of climate change on the bottom of the world's largest freshwater system.
item.dc:creator: Todd Richmond, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: JNUC 2024: Jamf brings AI and more to Apple enterprise
item.description: Apple management and security services provider Jamf unveiled a series of tools and features to support Apple admins at its well-attended JNUC event Oct. 1, with a focus on AI, security, and all-new solutions to make it easier to manage large Apple fleets.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Judge partially dismisses FTC's antitrust lawsuit against Amazon
item.description: A federal judge on Monday partially dismissed the Federal Trade Commission’s (FTC) antitrust lawsuit against Amazon. However, few details are currently available about U.S. District Judge John Chun’s decision, which was filed under seal.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: ONCD’s Harry Wingo on lowering barriers to good-paying cyber jobs
item.description: The Office of the National Cyber Director wants to fill thousands of open federal jobs under its Service for America initiative. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: ONCD’s Harry Wingo on lowering barriers to good-paying cyber jobs first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: Australia’s government says a code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Arkansas sues YouTube over claims that the site is fueling a mental health crisis
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas sued YouTube and parent company Alphabet on Monday, saying the video-sharing platform is made deliberately addictive and fueling a mental health crisis among youth in the state.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Thousands of Verizon users report outages
item.description: Thousands of Verizon users across the country were experiencing service outages Monday morning. More than 100,000 Verizon users had reported outages as of midday Monday, according to Downdetector. The outage tracker’s map showed hotspots near Tampa, Fla.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Brazil judge makes new requests to allow X to be reinstated from suspension
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes on Friday added conditions for Elon Musk’s X to have its service reestablished in the country, one day after the social media platform said it had complied with all the judge’s demands, including naming a legal representative.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: X requests it be reinstated in Brazil after complying with judge's orders, sources say
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — In the high-stakes showdown between the world’s richest man and a Brazilian Supreme Court justice, Elon Musk blinked. Musk’s social media site X has complied with Alexandre de Moraes’ orders and requested its service be reestablished in the country, two sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Security, AIOps top mainframe customer challenges, BMC says
item.description: Compliance, security, operational analytics, and AIOps are the top priorities for organizations investing heavily in mainframes, according to the 2024 BMC Mainframe Survey, which is in its 19th year and polled 1,000 customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World
